name: Ham and Eggs Bravo
recipeIngredient: 4 English muffins, split and toasted conventionally
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, salt, and pepper into mayonnaise; gradually add milk.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven until thickened for 1 1/2 minutes; stir.
3. Add cheese and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven until melted, about 1 1/2 more minutes.
4. Add onion, pimiento, ham, and eggs. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 to 4 minutes or until heated through. Serve on muffins.
